series_metadata.series_description: Controlling Board request forms and other relevant or attached documentation pertaining to capital requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for the life of the issuing bonds plus three years and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for the life of the issuing bonds plus three years and then transfer to State Archives. If of no historical value to State Archives, destroy., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
